notes: org hierarchy (parent role composed of its reports)
engagement value flow to counterparty entity
metric reads a contracted data surface
component serves the roles that use it
role holds/is-assigned a skill (inverse of TRP-028 view)
capability aggregates the skills it needs
producer process realizes a data-contract interface
data contract serves its consumer areas
a component realizes a BI/analytics consumer surface
BI consumer binds to define-once metrics (no parallel defs)
data product composed of per-surface data contracts
data product is a DATA-FAM capability umbrella
logical data model realized in a physical store (DAMA)
every external ingress declares a data contract
catalog indexes contracts as L3 read projection
application reads the T2 warehouse / stores
